goal: Enable 14 of 18 skipped acceptance tests — 4 remain deferred pending credential confirmation and Swoopy modelId page. Add Vitest unit tests for core/contact schema (DISTILL-05).

steps.name: Enable navigation acceptance tests
steps.description: Remove test.skip from navigation.spec.ts scenarios 2-8 and verify all pass. All pages and nav links already exist — this step confirms routing works end-to-end from user clicks. The 404 test asserts non-500 status for an unmatched path; adjust assertion if Nuxt dev returns 200 on the error page.
steps.scenario_name: visitor selects About and reaches the about page
acceptance_criteria: Scenarios 2-8 in navigation.spec.ts all enabled and green
Nav link clicks navigate to correct pages with correct h1
CTA 'Get in touch' navigates to contact form with Name field visible
quality_gates: no regressions in other spec files
deliverables: navigation.spec.ts with all 8 scenarios enabled and green

steps.name: Enable about page skipped scenarios
steps.description: Enable about-page.spec.ts scenarios 3-4. Scenario 3 (block order) checks for 'intro' and 'approach' keywords — 'intro' does not appear in any current block, so the test assertion must be fixed to use real content from about-approach.md (e.g. 'clearer thinking' and 'Background' in that order). Scenario 4 (unknown path 404) should return non-500.
steps.scenario_name: visitor sees all content blocks rendered in the order declared in the page frontmatter
acceptance_criteria: Scenario 3 enabled — asserts blocks render in declared order using real content text
Scenario 4 enabled — unknown /about/x returns non-500 status
deliverables: about-page.spec.ts with all 4 scenarios enabled and green

steps.name: Enable services page skipped scenarios
steps.description: Enable services-page.spec.ts scenarios 2-3. Scenario 2 checks for .prose selector with > 50 chars of text — services.vue uses class='prose' on ContentRenderer, so this should pass. Scenario 3 (unknown services sub-path) should return non-500.
steps.scenario_name: visitor reads content about how the coach works on the services page
acceptance_criteria: Scenario 2 enabled — .prose selector has visible text > 50 chars
Scenario 3 enabled — unknown /services/x returns non-500 status
deliverables: services-page.spec.ts with all 3 scenarios enabled and green

steps.name: Enable contact form a11y scenarios
steps.description: Enable contact-page.spec.ts scenarios 8-9. Scenario 8 (role=alert): ContactForm.vue already has role='alert' on error paragraphs — unskip and verify. Scenario 9 (disabled button during send): ContactForm.vue sets :disabled='submitting' and label 'Sending...' — may need Playwright route intercept on /api/contact to delay response so button state is observable. Use page.route() to intercept and delay.
steps.scenario_name: inline validation errors are communicated to visitors using assistive technology
acceptance_criteria: Scenario 8 enabled — role=alert element visible after empty form submit
Scenario 9 enabled — button shows disabled/Sending state during in-flight request
deliverables: contact-page.spec.ts with all 9 scenarios enabled and green

steps.name: Vitest unit tests for core/contact schema
steps.description: DISTILL-05: add Vitest unit tests for core/contact/contact-schema.ts. Pure function tests — no mocking. Cover: valid submission passes, empty name rejected, whitespace-only name rejected (Zod must trim), invalid email rejected, empty message rejected. If whitespace-only name currently passes (no .trim() in schema), add .trim().min(1) to the name field and make the test pass via TDD.
steps.scenario_name: whitespace-only name is rejected by the contact schema

deferred: trust-signals: B-Corp — unlock when credential earned and owner confirms display
trust-signals: 1% for the Planet — same condition
trust-signals: SSG HTML check — dependent on credential flags enabled
swoopy-embed: modelId scenario — unlock when a page embeds <SwoopyEmbed modelId='...' />
